title: Resolution Commending and Recognizing Ms. Aileen M. Lebornio From Barangay Mayondon, Los Baños, Laguna for Being the Assistant Coach to the Philippines Women?s Basketball Team Who Won Gold Medal in the 2019 Southeast Asian Games Which Was Held in the Philippines From November 30 to December 11,2019.
